motion.name: ease-button
motion.purpose: Button hover only; no layout animation.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main actions: Calculate Route, Download KMZ, Browse in upload zone.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #2d6b5a; color: #ffffff; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #245a4b; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2d6b5a; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Compare actions, Change file, developer toggles.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 16px; background: #ffffff; color: #1c1b19; border: 1px solid #c4bdb0; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f0ede6; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2d6b5a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.html: <label class="ds-label" for="gps">Post #1 (lat, lon)</label><input type="text" id="gps" class="ds-input" placeholder="-27.645312, -48.671234" />
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1c1b19; } .ds-input { width: 100%; font: inherit; color: #1c1b19; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #c4bdb0; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid #2d6b5a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Banner
components.html: Loading PDF… page 2 of 8
components.css: .ds-status { display: block; margin: 12px 0; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-status-info { color: #5c5852; background: #f0ede6; border: 1px solid #ddd8ce; } .ds-status-success { color: #1f5c38; background: #e8f3ec; border: 1px solid #b8d4c4; } .ds-status-error { color: #8b1f2e; background: #fceef0; border: 1px solid #e8b4bc; }

components.name: Step Panel
components.description: Step 2 coordinate and appearance block container.
components.html:
Step 2: Anchor GPS

Paste coordinates for post #1.
components.css: .ds-step-panel { margin-top: 32px; padding: 24px; background: #e8f0ec; border: 1px solid #ddd8ce; border-radius: 10px; } .ds-section-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 8px; color: #1c1b19; } .ds-muted { margin: 0 0 16px; color: #5c5852; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.55; }

components.name: Summary Panel
components.css: .ds-panel { margin: 12px 0; padding: 16px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #ddd8ce; background: #f0ede6; color: #1c1b19; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.55; }

narrative.overview: A single-column workflow on warm paper-toned canvas. Structure comes from numbered steps and quiet panels, not cards or sidebars. Typography is native system UI; color does the minimum work (accent for actions, semantic tints for status).
keyCharacteristics: Restrained palette: one green accent, warm neutrals
Flat surfaces; borders and background shifts instead of shadows
Step panels for coordinate and appearance entry
No modals, no hero blocks, no decorative motion

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Route Green appears only on primary actions and rare emphasis. Everything else is neutral or semantic.

dos: Keep the three-step flow visible in document order
Use semantic status classes (success, warning, error, info)
Tie labels to inputs with for / id
donts: Add card grids, side navigation, or dashboard chrome
Hide parser warnings to reduce visual noise
Use SaaS marketing chrome, glass cards, or dark developer themes by default
